news.t: Vietnam's footwear exports to US fell 27% in Sept amid Trump tariffs

holdings.infoBox: VNAM is an equity ETF with a total of 70 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vingroup JSC stock at 20.13%, Hoa Phat Group JSC at 6.65%, FPT Corporation at 4.03%, Masan Group at 3.54%, and Joint Stock Commercial Bank for Foreign Trade of Vietnam at 3.52%.

overview.description: The Global X MSCI Vietnam ETF (VNAM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Vietnam Select 25/50 index. The fund tracks a broad index of equities of various capitalization from Vietnam. The portfolio is weighted by free-float market cap, adjusted using a liquidity discount factor. VNAM was launched on Dec 7, 2021 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Vietnam's footwear exports to US fell 27% in Sept amid Trump tariffs
data.text: Vietnam's footwear exports to the United States plunged 27% in September to $611 million, marking the steepest decline among all sectors following the implementation of tariffs by the U.S. government,...

data.title: Exceptionalism starts to happen in some emerging markets, such as Vietnam: Portfolio manager
data.text: Steven Quattry, Morgan Stanley Investment Management says a number of emerging markets are undergoing structural reforms, hence attracting foreign capital.
